author: Болд Д.
text: Nice view, food, atmosphere and service. The steak was cooked to perfection and the staff were incredibly attentive. Will definitely be coming back!

author: Сарнай М.
text: Beautiful modern building with rooftop terrace. Sunset views while dining made the experience truly magical. The Khuushuur was the best I've ever tasted.

author: Тэмүүжин Б.
text: Food was very tasty and service was excellent. The traditional Mongolian dishes are authentic and the modern presentation is impressive. Highly recommend!

author: Мөнхзул О.
text: Гайхалтай орчин, амтлаг хоол. Цуйван нь үнэхээр онцгой байлаа. Найз нөхөд, гэр бүлтэйгээ ирэхэд тохиромжтой газар.

author: Анхбаяр Г.
text: Great family restaurant with authentic Mongolian cuisine. The atmosphere is warm and welcoming. Service could be a touch faster during peak hours but overall excellent.
